ddls:
CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the athlete */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the athlete */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the athlete */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the athlete belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position the athlete plays */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the athlete */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the athlete */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current injury status of the athlete */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach managing the team */,
  "home_city" TEXT /* Home city of the team */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date when the team was founded */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the home stadium */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the coach */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date when the coach was hired */,
  "previous_experience" TEXT /* Brief description of the coach's previous experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year the game took place */,
  "season_game" INTEGER /* Game number in the season */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the game was played */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the game was played */,
  "opponent_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  "game_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game type */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_game_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_type_id") REFERENCES game_types ("game_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES seasons ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performances" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game in which the performance was recorded */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the athlete whose performance is recorded */,
  "pts" INTEGER /* Points scored by the athlete in that game */,
  "game_result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., W for Win, L for Loss) */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Number of rebounds in the game */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists in the game */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Number of turnovers in the game */,
  "minutes_played" REAL /* Number of minutes played in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., '2022 Regular Season') */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the championship in the season */,
  "playoff_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the playoffs */,
  "playoff_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the playoffs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_types" (
  "game_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the game type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the game type */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the game type period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the game type period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the athlete who sustained the injury */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the injury occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the injury */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Estimated duration of recovery in days */,
  "recovery_status" TEXT /* Current status of recovery */,
  "medical_notes" TEXT /* Additional medical notes or recommendations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance review */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the athlete being reviewed */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game associated with the review */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the coach or analyst */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Numerical rating given by the coach or analyst */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach or analyst who wrote the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for account security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, coach, athlete) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_stats" (
  "stats_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance stat record */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the athlete */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year for which stats are aggregated */,
  "total_pts" INTEGER /* Total points scored across all games in the season */,
  "average_pts" REAL /* Average points scored per game in the season */,
  "total_rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds across all games in the season */,
  "total_assists" INTEGER /* Total assists across all games in the season */,
  "total_turnovers" INTEGER /* Total turnovers across all games in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stats_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_stats_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_stats_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES seasons ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)
